biological_replicate: we first examined expression of CD209L in human tissues from SARS-CoV-2 target organs
technical_replicate: Multiple biochemical assays using a purified recombinant SARS-CoV-2 spike receptor-binding domain
experimental_design: interaction study of receptors with SARS-CoV-2
we report the identification of CD209L/L-SIGN and the related protein CD209/DC-SIGN as receptors capable of mediating SARS-CoV-2 entry
factor_value: we report the identification of CD209L/L-SIGN and the related protein CD209/DC-SIGN
number_of_fractions: no fractionation or pre-fractionation is described
number_of_biological_replicates: human tissues from SARS-CoV-2 target organs
number_of_samples: human tissues from SARS-CoV-2 target organs
